title: Sparse Matrix Representation: A Comparison
description: A visual comparison of a standard 2D array representation versus the more efficient Coordinate List (COO) representation for a sparse matrix.
elements: Sparse Matrix (6x6 grid with only 3 non-zero values)
Coordinate List (COO) Table with columns: Row, Column, Value
relationships: The Standard 2D Array stores all 36 values, mostly zeros, which is inefficient
The Sparse Matrix highlights the few non-zero elements amidst the zeros
The COO Table efficiently stores only the row index, column index, and value for each non-zero element, drastically reducing memory usage
